data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MOCAMBORA MIA was safely held last time out, finishing fifth at this track over 305m behind Lust To Burn (18.18) in a Other. Was in the money the start prior. Good beginner assisted by the inside draw. Can atone. 8. COMPTON COPY is a talented type and proved too strong last time to win by 1.3 lengths at this track in a handy 23.26 beating Dell Mister. The form out of her last race has been franked. Expected to feature again. 2. CHEQUES TO BURN has been settling off the speed lately, finishing fourth (22.53) last time in a Grade 5 at Warrnambool. Solid record at the distance winning 10 races. The form out of her last race has been franked. Better than the latest run and deserves another chance. 4. FREDDY DEEDS jumps at a shorter distance and still warrants respect.","runners":[1,8,2,4],"exclusive":false}
